query: ChecklistFox: AI checklist maker for beautiful pdfs, free & instant review site:producthunt.com

results.title: ChecklistFox: AI checklist maker for beautiful pdfs, free & instant
results.content: Hey Product Hunt! I built ChecklistFox for my wife. When preparing for an important trip, we were jumping between ten different websites, copy-pasting into Google Docs, still missing things. People want a simple clean checklist they can actually use. It's completely free. No sign-up needed.

results.title: ChecklistFox Competitors & Alternatives
results.content: Exploring ChecklistFox alternatives? Try Arrange, Wanderlog, Elisi and Mentor.
